meta.description: All equipment types the engine knows about. Used when generating starting equipment, processing orders, and calculating condition decay. Condition is 0-100, decays weekly based on usage, reaches 0 if not maintained — maintenance events restore condition. squareMetersRequired of 0 means portable — stored in any zone. The ring's 36sqm requirement means adding a ring to a small gym significantly reduces training capacity.

equipment.label: Boxing Ring
equipment.description: Full competition-spec boxing ring. Essential for ring craft development — without a ring, fighters cannot develop proper ring generalship or footwork.

equipment.label: Heavy Bag
equipment.description: Standard hanging heavy bag. Workhorse of the gym — develops punching output and combination work.

equipment.label: Speed Bag
equipment.description: Wall-mounted speed bag platform. Develops hand speed and rhythm.

equipment.label: Double End Bag
equipment.description: Floor-to-ceiling bag on elastic cord. Demands precise timing and accuracy.

equipment.label: Maize Bag
equipment.description: Teardrop-shaped bag that swings unpredictably. Trains head movement and defensive positioning.

equipment.label: Focus Mitts
equipment.description: Held pads requiring a coach or training partner. Best tool for technique and punch selection — the coach sees everything and corrects in real time.

equipment.label: Body Shield
equipment.description: Large pad worn by the coach or partner. Develops body punching power and targeting.

equipment.label: Skipping Ropes
equipment.description: Portable conditioning tool. Wears fast and costs almost nothing — buy in bulk. Builds stamina and footwork rhythm.

equipment.label: Dumbbells Set
equipment.description: Full set of dumbbells. Foundational strength equipment — develops power and structural durability.

equipment.label: Bench Press
equipment.description: Barbell bench press station. Significant upper body power builder.

equipment.label: Pull-Up Bar
equipment.description: Wall-mounted pull-up station. Builds back and core strength, improving recovery and structural toughness.

equipment.label: Squat Rack
equipment.description: Full squat rack with safety bars. Builds leg strength — transfers to footwork and stamina in a way no other equipment does.
